title: Hologenica
description: Advanced sci-fi technology, including entity cloning, holograms and cross-dimensional teleportation.
body:
# ✦ Hologenica
Advanced sci-fi technology, including entity cloning, holograms and cross-dimensional teleportation.

![NeoForge 1.21.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/NeoForge-1.21.1-green?style=for-the-badge)
![Fabric 1.21.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric-1.21.1-green?style=for-the-badge)

![Banner](https://cdn.modvane.com/mods/hologenica/listing/banner.webp)

You can do **/hologenica** ingame to get a manual with all recipes & guides!  

## ✦ Features

``✦ Hologram - Project your surrounding area using hologram projectors.``
  
![Hologram](https://cdn.modvane.com/mods/hologenica/listing/01.webp)

``✦ Neurocell - The pod that houses the entity you want to clone.``
  
![Neurocell](https://cdn.modvane.com/mods/hologenica/listing/02.webp)

``✦ Neurolink - Fully modular cables to connect Neurocells with other devices.``
  
![Neurolink](https://cdn.modvane.com/mods/hologenica/listing/03.webp?v=2)

``✦ Imprinter - Scans living entities standing on it to capture their genetic data.``
  
![Imprinter](https://cdn.modvane.com/mods/hologenica/listing/04.webp)

``✦ Reformer - The device that actually grows the entity.``
  
![Reformer](https://cdn.modvane.com/mods/hologenica/listing/05.webp)

``✦ Telepad - Teleport across locations or dimensions.``
  
![Telepad](https://cdn.modvane.com/mods/hologenica/listing/06.webp)
